title: Pylons
body:
Currently adds the following blocks.

#### Expulsion Pylon:
Intended for use on servers, this block allows you to expel other players from the chunk it's placed in.
You can whitelist players with a Player Filter - OPs are always whitelisted.

![Expulsion Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/c4afce1c8742492c1d9992ccc375a2a4aee5af18.png "Expulsion Pylon Recipe")

![Player Filter Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/fe22931a35f7d8ed8cff1fdf640eee8b406aaa25.png "Player Filter Recipe")


#### Infusion Pylon:
Allows you to apply effects to yourself from any distance (may require chunkloading) with activated Potion Filters.
Potion Filters can be activated by applying an effect to yourself (from a potion, for example) and then right-clicking the Potion Filter.
The minimum effect duration that can be extracted is 60 seconds by default.
This will extract all remaining duration from the player and apply it to the Filter. 
To fully activate it, you will need a total of 1 hour of duration, the equivalent of 7.5 vanilla extended potions.

If you have multiple cards containing the same effect, you can combine them. Place one card in each hand, and right click. 
The duration from the off hand card will be added to the card in your main hand.

![Infusion Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/e2fe944f17c234870cc71bbdcc3f99e99ed7d7c7.png "Infusion Pylon Recipe")

![Potion Filter Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/a1d56deb0bcb70a9f158503268263e44689d6a5e.png "Potion Filter Recipe")

#### Harvester Pylon:
Harvests crops in a configurable radius (from 3x3 to 9x9) around the pylon and outputs to an inventory above.
Place the pylon inside the water block of the farm:

![Harvester Placement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/c3b2adcaef27173845654121acd421e115bd72b3.png "Harvester Placement")

By default, the pylon requires a hoe in the pylon inventory, and will consume 1 durability per crop harvest. There is a config option to disable this. 
Unbreakable hoes, such as Mystical Agriculture's Supremium Hoe, can be used.

![Harvester Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/f82941c1125f9a3a13b078c9a87c7a10d4f2c819.png "Harvester Pylon Recipe")

#### Interdiction Pylon
Prevents all spawns of specified mobs within the selected chunk range (1x1 to 5x5). 
Right click on a mob with a Mob Filter, then add the filter to the pylon to block that mob.

![Interdiction Pylon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/8155f57aa630a81443c81bea2a56d2a39c651bd2.png "Interdiction Pylon Recipe")

![Mob Filter Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A82glthi/images/9b538d7c1fdc51d0b0b6cab1e80b5f8271eec02b.png "Mob Filter Recipe")
